name: NZ Post eShip Setup
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can setup NZ Post eShip integration to work with Neto by following the guide on the "}, {"text": "eShip website"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We recommend that "}, {"text": "Pack", "bold": true}, {"text": " is entered in the order status field in step 4 of their guide, as orders should not be exported for consignments until this order status is met."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Please Note", "bold": true}, {"text": ": If orders coming into Neto go straight to the "}, {"text": "Pick", "bold": true}, {"text": " status, you will need to enter "}, {"text": "Pick", "bold": true}, {"text": " or "}, {"text": "Pack", "bold": true}, {"text": " in the order status to make sure all orders are imported."}]}]
